meaning: n.横跨的一步,(侧面的)台阶vt.横跨一步躲闪,回避(困难)vi.回避问题,躲避打击
examples: Rarely, if ever, does he sidestep a question.
Try your best to sidestep for sensitive issues like this.
To sidestep such blockers, you can use DHTML.
So we were able to sidestep much of the trouble associated with excess debt.
Yet, time and again, enterprising consumers and businesses have found ways to sidestep the networks.
